label: FAIL
rationale: The target reports SUCCESS for StartTrustedSession as the first and only method. The cited rule says StartTrustedSession/SyncTrustedSession, if used, SHALL occur after StartSession/SyncSession and otherwise SHALL return an error result.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target reports SUCCESS for StartTrustedSession after EndSession. StartTrustedSession is part of session startup after the StartSession/SyncSession exchange, and invocation at any other time must return an error.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target StartTrustedSession is invoked on AdminSP, but the method definition is SMUID.StartTrustedSession. A successful invocation on a non-SMUID target is not compliant with the cited method definition.
